prompt: I've corrected you on this before: the rename script must use perl -pi -e, not sed -i, because sed -i breaks on macOS, and you just used sed -i again. Use the capture-lesson skill to record this correction so it never happens again.
note: capture-lesson SKILL.md mandate: append (not clobber) '## <title> (<YYYY-MM-DD>)' with What happened/Rule bullets
